properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret for token creation and validation.

properties.name: app.pii.secret
properties.description: Secret used by the PII crypto service for encrypting sensitive profile fields.

properties.name: openai.api.key
properties.description: API key used by the AI assistant backend integration.

properties.name: openai.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for the AI assistant completion endpoint.

properties.name: openai.model
properties.description: Model name used by the AI assistant backend integration.

properties.name: openai.max-tokens
properties.description: Maximum tokens requested from the AI assistant backend integration.
